feed.title: 3dev
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive, and powerful Jekyll theme for presenting professional writing.

entry.title: Bézier curves explained from scratch
entry.summary: Introduction Bezier curves have become a very widely used tool in computer sciences, especially when dealing with graphic rendering. They offer a large range of application, and I will cover some of them. But later. The maths that lie behind Bezier curves are not that complicated. And I believe it is important to understand it before you want to work with them, whatever the problem you are wo...
